vertical: Cybersecurity asset management — late-stage ($2.6B valuation), enterprise GTM motion
objective: Land Axonius as a net-new Conversion customer while the post-Series-E expansion window is open. Three signal types stacked in the scan window: a $200M Series E at a $2.6B valuation (headcount and marketing investment scaling), a 2-star Pardot G2 review naming broken attribution and unreliable Salesforce sync, and a live marketing-operations job posting. Highest ICP fit in the scan (10.0) — Pardot pain plus warehouse signals. Buying committee is the Marketing Ops lead plus the Head of Data. Shelf life ~6 days from the freshest signal.
lifecycle_stage: Prospect · New — active buying window, high urgency

segment.name: Pardot-Pain Late-Stage SaaS — Axonius Single-Account
salesforce_filters: Contact.Title LIKE '%Marketing Operations%' OR Contact.Title LIKE '%Head of Data%' OR Contact.Title LIKE '%VP Marketing%'
warehouse_traits: g2_review_keywords_matched IN ('broken attribution', 'unreliable sync', 'data exports', 'workarounds') AND review_source = 'G2'
job_posting_active = TRUE WHERE job_title LIKE '%Marketing Operations%' AND required_skills INCLUDES ('Salesforce', 'Snowflake', 'BigQuery') AND job_board = 'Greenhouse'
funding_event_type = 'Series E' AND funding_event_date >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE()) AND funding_amount_usd >= 200000000
intent_topic_spike IN ('marketing automation replacement', 'Pardot alternative', 'warehouse-native MAP') AND intent_surge_percentile >= 80
segment.estimated_size: 1 account / 2 contacts (Marketing Ops Lead + Head of Data)

touches.timing: Day 0 — send within 2 hours of brief activation, Tuesday–Thursday 9–11 AM recipient local time
touches.subject: {{contact.first_name}}, Axonius's Pardot replacement window is now
touches.body_brief: Open with the G2 review signal as social proof, not accusation: someone on a team like theirs publicly called out broken attribution, unreliable Salesforce sync, and 40% MOPs time lost to workarounds — 5 days ago. Name Axonius's Series E and the new enterprise-vertical expansion as the forcing function: the stack they outgrew just became the stack that will slow the next phase. Position Conversion as warehouse-native MAP built for exactly the Salesforce + Snowflake/BigQuery motion their new MOPs hire will own. Single CTA: 15-minute live data sync demo scoped to Axonius's current Pardot pain points.
qa_rules: Suppress send if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = TRUE
Suppress send if Account.Conversion_Trial_Status__c IN ('Active', 'Converted')
Validate {{account.marketing_automation_platform}} resolves to 'Pardot' — block send if NULL or resolves to competitor
Validate {{warehouse.g2_review_excerpt}} is non-NULL and ≤ 280 characters; flag for human review if truncated mid-sentence
Spam-gate check: subject line must not contain ALL-CAPS words or more than one punctuation mark
Deduplication: confirm no email touch delivered to same Contact.Id within prior 72 hours
Verify {{account.funding_round}} token resolves correctly; block if funding_event_date > 30 days ago (signal stale)
touches.success_metric: Email open rate ≥ 45%; CTA click-through to demo booking page ≥ 12%

touches.timing: Day 1 — 24 hours after Step 1 send; task fires only if Step 1 email was opened but CTA not clicked
touches.subject: AE LinkedIn + phone blitz — Axonius MOPs Lead & Head of Data
touches.body_brief: AE task brief: reach out to both the Marketing Ops Lead and Head of Data via LinkedIn DM and phone. Reference the same signal stack the email used — the live Greenhouse job posting requiring warehouse fluency is the strongest warm-open (it signals they are actively building toward this). Mention that the new hire will inherit whatever MAP decision gets made now. Do NOT send a generic product pitch; open with the hiring signal and ask one question: 'Is the MAP decision already in flight, or is the new hire owning it?' Log outcome in Salesforce Activity. Do not leave a voicemail on first call; LinkedIn DM only if no answer.
qa_rules: Task must be assigned to the named AE owner on the Axonius account record — block if Account.OwnerId is NULL or maps to queue
Confirm both Contact records exist in Salesforce with Title fields populated before firing task
Verify Step 1 email open event is confirmed in engagement log before triggering; do not fire if Step 1 was suppressed
Task due date must be set to same calendar day as trigger — reject if default 7-day Salesforce task deadline is applied
Log task type as 'Outbound — Signal-Triggered' in Task.Type__c field for attribution tracking
touches.success_metric: AE LinkedIn DM reply rate or call connect rate ≥ 30%; Salesforce Task.Status__c updated to 'Completed' within 24 hours of creation

touches.timing: Day 2 — serve banner if any Axonius contact visits Conversion.com or the product demo environment; frequency cap 1 impression per contact per 48 hours
touches.subject: Axonius: See your Pardot data in Conversion in 15 minutes
touches.body_brief: Short, high-signal banner — no more than two sentences plus CTA button. Lead with the warehouse-native angle: 'Your Snowflake data, your Salesforce pipeline, one attribution layer — no exports.' Reference the G2 pain point implicitly ('built for teams done with workarounds'). CTA button text: 'Book the 15-min sync demo.' Banner should render in both light and dark mode and be dismissible with suppression cookie set on dismiss.
qa_rules: Banner suppressed if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = TRUE or global suppression flag is active (privacy opt-out covers in-app personalization per consent model)
Frequency cap enforced: no more than 1 impression per Contact.Id per 48-hour window — QA agent must check impression log before serve
Validate account identity resolution: banner fires ONLY if visitor IP/cookie maps to confirmed Axonius domain (axonius.com) — block on ambiguous resolution
Confirm CTA deep-link URL is valid and routes to Axonius-prefilled demo booking page (UTM params: utm_source=in_app, utm_campaign=pardot-replacement, utm_account=axonius)
A/B variant must be selected by optimization agent before execution agent serves — do not serve control variant by default if test is active
touches.success_metric: Banner CTR ≥ 8%; demo booking conversion from banner click ≥ 20%

touches.timing: Day 3 — send only if no demo booked by Day 3 00:00 recipient local time; send at 8:00 AM recipient local time
touches.subject: The MOPs hire you're onboarding will ask why you kept Pardot
touches.body_brief: Reframe the urgency around the hiring signal, not just the funding event. The new marketing-ops hire requiring Salesforce + warehouse fluency is a forcing function: they will evaluate the MAP stack on Day 30. Show the cost of the status quo in concrete terms — the G2 reviewer called out 40% of MOPs time on workarounds; at a scaled post-Series-E headcount that compounds fast. Introduce one proof point: a named customer case study of a similarly staged company (Series C–E, Salesforce + Snowflake stack) that replaced Pardot with Conversion and reclaimed attribution fidelity within 60 days. Close with urgency framing: 'The buying window on this is weeks, not quarters — your next hire will own whatever you decide now.' CTA: same demo booking link, but with secondary option to download the Pardot-to-Conversion migration guide (gated via Salesforce form-fill).
personalization_tokens: {{content.case_study_title}} (dynamically matched by vertical = cybersecurity or closest funded SaaS comp)
qa_rules: Hard gate: suppress if demo is already booked (check Opportunity.StageName = 'Meeting Scheduled' or calendar booking webhook event)
Suppress if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = TRUE
Validate {{content.case_study_title}} token resolves to a published, live URL — block send if 404 detected on asset link
Validate {{link.migration_guide_url}} resolves and form-fill is functional in staging before send
Confirm Step 1 email was delivered (not bounced) before sending Step 4 — suppress and flag for AE if hard bounce on Step 1
Subject line spam-gate: flag 'kept Pardot' phrasing for deliverability check — confirm sender domain reputation score ≥ 85 before send
Deduplication: no more than 2 emails delivered to same Contact.Id within this campaign sequence in any 7-day window
touches.success_metric: Email reply rate ≥ 8%; demo booking conversion from this touch ≥ 10%; migration guide download ≥ 15% of clicks

touches.timing: Day 5 — send if no demo booked and no reply to Steps 1 or 4; send between 9 AM–12 PM recipient local time
touches.subject: LinkedIn InMail: Axonius + Conversion — one attribution layer, zero Pardot exports
touches.body_brief: Final touch before shelf-life expiry (Day 6). Short-form InMail from the AE, not a marketing alias — personal tone, direct ask. Open by acknowledging the Series E and what it means for the marketing org's mandate. Name the warehouse-native MAP angle in one sentence. Create urgency with shelf-life framing without being manipulative: 'I have a technical scoping slot open this week specifically for teams mid-Pardot-evaluation.' Close with one question CTA to lower friction: 'Worth 15 minutes this week?' No attachments, no links other than the AE's calendar link. Character limit ≤ 300 words.
qa_rules: Suppress if demo already booked or Opportunity.StageName has advanced past 'Prospecting'
Suppress if any inbound reply (email or LinkedIn) detected from this contact in the prior 5 days — do not send if conversation is already active
Confirm AE LinkedIn Sales Navigator seat is active and InMail credits are available (≥1 credit) before task fires
Validate {{sender.ae_calendar_link}} is live and has availability within the next 5 business days — block if calendar shows no open slots
Word count QA: flag InMail body if > 300 words — optimization agent must approve override
Confirm contact LinkedIn profile URL is resolved and active in Sales Navigator before send — do not send to stale/inactive profiles
touches.success_metric: InMail acceptance + reply rate ≥ 25%; demo booked from this touch ≥ 10%; overall sequence demo-booked rate ≥ 30% by Day 6

optimization_triggers.condition: Demo booked at any step (calendar booking webhook fires OR Opportunity.StageName = 'Meeting Scheduled')
optimization_triggers.action: Immediately suppress all remaining touches for that Contact.Id; optimization agent re-segments contact into 'Active Opportunity — Demo Booked' cohort; AE task created with pre-call research brief including full signal stack (Series E, G2 review excerpt, job posting details)

optimization_triggers.condition: warehouse.intent_topic_spike fires for 'Pardot alternative' OR 'marketing automation replacement' with surge_percentile >= 90 at any point during campaign runtime
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent pulls forward next scheduled touch by 24 hours; subject line variant B (urgency-forward) allocated 80% send share via bandit reallocation; AE notified via Slack alert with intent spike data

optimization_triggers.condition: Step 1 or Step 4 email hard-bounces (bounce_type = 'hard') OR Contact.Email validity score drops below 0.7 in warehouse
optimization_triggers.action: QA agent suppresses email channel for affected Contact.Id; execution agent reroutes remaining email touches to LinkedIn InMail equivalent; AE task fired immediately to source validated contact email via LinkedIn or ZoomInfo enrichment

optimization_triggers.condition: G2 review velocity increases (new ≤2-star Pardot review posted referencing Axonius domain or reviewer profile linked to axonius.com) during campaign window
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent inserts new social-proof personalization variant citing freshest review into Steps 4 and 5 body; QA agent validates new review token resolves correctly before variant goes live

optimization_triggers.condition: AE task (Step 2) marked 'Completed — Positive Response' in Salesforce within 48 hours AND no demo yet booked
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent suppresses Step 3 in_app_banner and Step 4 email; execution agent fires a tailored follow-up AE task with specific talk-track based on AE-logged objection or interest signal from Step 2 call notes

optimization_triggers.condition: Campaign Day 6 reached with zero touches replied to, zero demo booked, and Account.ICP_Score__c remains >= 9.0
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent re-queues account into a 14-day re-engagement hold pool; QA agent logs full touch history to Salesforce Campaign Member record; AE receives end-of-window summary task with recommendation to escalate to VP-level contact or await next signal trigger

optimization_triggers.condition: New hiring signal detected: additional marketing-ops, data-engineering, or RevOps job posting goes live on Greenhouse or LinkedIn for Axonius during campaign window
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent refreshes {{warehouse.job_posting_title}} token in all pending touches to reference newest posting; sequence shelf-life extended by 3 days; AE task updated with new hiring context

pipeline_projection.expected_renewals: N/A — net-new prospect. Expected outcome: 1 demo booked within 6-day window (target probability 55%), converting to 1 active opportunity at $80K–$140K ACV (Conversion enterprise tier, Axonius headcount 500–1000, full MAP replacement + warehouse connector bundle). Full close probability within 90 days given active buying window: 35%. Expected pipeline contribution: $112,000 ACV (probability-weighted).
pipeline_projection.ae_efficiency: AE time investment: ~2.5 hours total across 5-touch sequence (30 min Step 2 blitz, 45 min pre-call research if demo books, 15 min Salesforce logging). Automated touches (Steps 1, 3, 4, 5) require zero AE time post-brief activation. AE-to-pipeline leverage ratio: $112K weighted pipeline / 2.5 AE hours = $44,800 per AE hour — well above $15K/hr efficiency floor.
pipeline_projection.campaign_runtime: 6 days from brief activation (signal shelf-life constraint). Full 5-touch sequence completes by Day 5. Day 6 is optimization-trigger evaluation and re-queue or escalation decision. Reactivation window: 14-day hold pool if no response, re-triggered on next intent spike or new hiring signal.
pipeline_projection.downside: Downside scenario (probability 45%): no demo booked within 6-day window. Causes: (a) both target contacts are unresponsive or on PTO during window, (b) MAP decision is already in legal/procurement with a competitor, (c) Axonius freezes MarTech spend pending board-approved post-Series-E budget cycle. Downside impact: $0 pipeline in this window; $112K ACV deferred to re-engagement pool. Mitigation: Step 5 LinkedIn touch extends reach to alternate committee members; AE escalation trigger on Day 6 preserves relationship. Floor outcome: Axonius account is enriched in Salesforce with full signal history and re-queued for next trigger — no sunk cost beyond 2.5 AE hours and automated send costs.

meta.buying_window_urgency: HIGH — 6-day shelf life from freshest signal (G2 review, 5 days ago)
signal_stack: FUNDING_EVENT: $200M Series E at $2.6B valuation (12 days ago, Crunchbase)
G2_REVIEW_VELOCITY: 2-star Pardot review citing broken attribution, unreliable Salesforce sync, 40% MOPs time on workarounds (5 days ago, G2)
HIRING: Live MOPs job posting requiring Salesforce + warehouse fluency (7 days ago, Greenhouse)

agent_role_summary.execution: Owns send timing, channel selection, personalization token injection for Steps 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
agent_role_summary.qa: Owns suppression logic, spam-gate checks, token validation, deduplication, bounce handling across all steps
agent_role_summary.optimization: Owns A/B variant selection, bandit reallocation, cohort re-segmentation, trigger-based sequence mutation

signals.description: $200M Series E at a $2.6B valuation. Expanding into new enterprise verticals means marketing-automation investment scales with headcount — fresh budget for a stack upgrade.

2-star G2 review of Pardot: 'Pardot feels like it was built for a different era. Attribution is broken, reporting requires constant data exports, and the Salesforce sync is unreliable. Our MOPs team is spending 40% of their time on workarounds. Replacing it.'
Live marketing-operations job posting requiring Salesforce plus warehouse fluency — pulled from the job-board scan this morning. The one signal in this stack collected live, not seeded.

why_now.rationale: 3 signals detected in the last 12 days. Buying window closes in ~2 days.
